issues.title: Enemy dealt 70 dmg (68% of 103 HP) on floor 9
issues.description: On floor 9, encounter 2, turn 12 (seq 487), the enemy dealt 70 damage which is 68% of the player's 103 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 48 dmg (87% of 55 HP) on floor 12

issues.title: Enemy dealt 48 dmg (100% of 48 HP) on floor 12

issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 8 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-3)
issues.description: 8 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:100HP, F1E1:95HP, F1E2:100HP, F2E0:96HP, F2E1:100HP, F2E2:94HP, F3E0:100HP, F3E1:95HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 6 turns vs prev floor avg 2.3
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 took 6 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.3 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: ember_drake (mini_boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 7 in floor 12 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 12, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 7. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (466 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
